name: browser
description: Run safety-first browser QA for console, visual, mobile, smoke, and form workflows. Migrated workflows: $browser-console-errors, $browser-form-submit-test, $browser-mobile-test, $browser-smoke-test, $browser-visual-check.

interface.longDescription: Run safety-first browser QA for console, visual, mobile, smoke, and form workflows. Migrated workflows: $browser-console-errors, $browser-form-submit-test, $browser-mobile-test, $browser-smoke-test, $browser-visual-check. This Codex-native edition packages explicit workflows as skills, records sensitive actions as explicit-only, and uses portable installed-skill paths.
defaultPrompt: Use Solo Browser QA to help with this project.
